content.thinking:
The user is making a fun announcement in a group chat saying "恭迎虾王登基！@_all" which translates to "Welcome the Shrimp King's ascension to the throne! @all"

This seems like a playful/humorous message. I was mentioned via @_all. This is casual banter - I should either stay silent or respond lightly if it fits.

Since I was mentioned via @all, and this is a fun group moment, a brief lighthearted reaction would be appropriate. I'll keep it short and fun.
